hero_subtitle: SFTY helps digital asset exchanges consolidate fragmented compliance workflows into one operational system for audit-ready decisions, regulatory visibility, and scalable risk control.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams at digital asset exchanges often lack a unified view of regulatory readiness and operational risk. Fragmented provider outputs and disconnected processes slow audit preparation and obscure a clear compliance control picture.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes provider data, case workflows, risk signals and audit evidence into a unified compliance operating layer to help exchange leadership monitor readiness and control regulatory risk with clarity.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to regulatory readiness
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider checks, regulatory updates and internal reviews into structured cases, decisions and reports to support exchange compliance readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. Clear executive risk control
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives exchange leadership a provider-neutral layer to unify compliance workflows, preserve audit evidence and deliver clear, defensible visibility across regulatory readiness activities.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports crypto exchanges with a controlled compliance layer to preserve audit evidence, orchestrate provider data, and prepare for bank due diligence and regulatory review.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support exchange regulatory readiness reviews
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows improve audit readiness for exchanges
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence packages support regulatory questions and inspections
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY enhances enterprise risk control and decision clarity
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides exchange executives with a connected compliance control layer that improves risk visibility, reduces manual tasks, and supports audit-ready workflows across onboarding, risk, case management and reporting.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support regulatory readiness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY helps exchanges prepare for regulatory review by structuring provider outputs into traceable workflows, linking regulatory changes to internal rules and automating evidence collection for due diligence and inspections.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories, provider results and regulatory rule updates to maintain a comprehensive audit trail suitable for internal and external compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operating model without disrupting current tools or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers but consolidates their data into structured reviews, cases and reports to enhance operational control and audit readiness.
final_title: Prepare exchange compliance for regulatory review
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into audit-ready evidence, case workflows and regulatory risk controls for exchanges.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
